ai_tips: Starting out at 5m — 5.08km ahead with 6m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔5米出发——全程5.08公里，累计爬升6米。
0.52km in — pace 5:31/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.52公里——配速5:31/公里，强度正在建立。
Mid-run at 2.74km — the route is largely flat to downhill (total climb just 1m), so rhythm matters more than strength. 进行到2.74公里过半程——路线以平路和下坡为主（总爬升仅1米），节奏比力量更关键。
High point of the route: 6m at 4.61km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点6米，位于4.61公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -2.5% at 4.99km — you let it flow at 5:24/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：4.99公里处坡度-2.5%——你顺势加速到5:24/公里，下坡信心不错。
5.01km — late-run check: pace 5:36/km, still holding form well. 5.01公里——后程检查：配速5:36/公里，节奏保持得不错。
Finished 5.08km in 30:59 (avg 6:06/km, +6m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成5.08公里，用时30:59（平均配速6:06/公里，爬升6米）。全程稳定扎实。
